title: Weird Commands
description: Adding commands to things that don't have any
body:
Adding commands to parts of Minecraft that probably shouldn't have any...

This mod adds commands to
  • apply one of the old "super secret settings' aka built in shaders to players
  • change selected language of a player
  • change perspective for player (third-person front view etc)
  • enable smooth camera for player

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
